pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to support the 'release' flag and Java 11 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin (e.g., 3.1) do not support the <release> configuration option required for Java 9+ module system compatibility and single-release compilation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch compiler configuration from separate source/target to unified release flag for Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: The <source> and <target> flags are deprecated in favor of <release> for Java 9+ to ensure API compatibility with the target JDK version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update jacoco-maven-plugin to a version compatible with Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions (e.g., 0.7.x) do not support Java 11 class files and will fail at runtime when instrumenting code compiled for Java 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace or supplement Java EE Inject annotations.
